case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. PLACIDO, LEONARDO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PAUL BRENNER FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.
